description: Akshay Kumar and Wamiqa Gabbi's horror-comedy 'Bhooth Bangla' has made a strong debut, grossing Rs 42 crore in India and Rs 60.50 crore worldwide within its first two days. Directed by Priyadarshan, the film marks a reunion for the director and Akshay Kumar after 15 years.

title: CM Stalin interview: ‘Arrival of new people in politics happened many times, Tamil Nadu also knows they disappeared’
How a Michelin-star chef reimagined leftovers for the world
description: Chef Massimo Bottura's nonprofit, Food for Soul, transforms surplus food into nourishing meals, combating waste and poverty.  Inspired by his grandmother's resourcefulness, the organization creates welcoming spaces that offer dignity and hope, proving that discarded ingredients can become a source of sustenance and community.

Amravati sex abuse: 15-year-old 1st survivor to record statement
description: A 15-year-old survivor bravely came forward to record her statement in the Amravati sexual abuse case. This is a significant breakthrough for the special investigation team. Police are actively searching for seven other identified survivors. The main accused and others are already named in the FIR. Authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward to ensure justice.

title: Arsha drew cars, Fatema the globe: Artwork by kids killed in Iran school bombing come to Delhi
'Clear way for marriage': 5-year-old killed by mother’s partner in Telangana
description: A five-year-old boy was brutally killed by his mother's live-in partner in Kamareddy. The accused allegedly smothered and beat the child after his mother left home. Police arrested both the partner and the mother, stating they planned to eliminate the boy due to his mental health issues to facilitate their marriage. The eight-year-old sister is the sole eyewitness.

title: ‘Stabbed repeatedly’: Inside south Delhi father-son double murder
description: A brutal attack in Delhi's Alaknanda left a father and son dead after a dispute over a high-interest loan. Rakesh Sood and his son Karan were allegedly stabbed multiple times by a neighbour, Asad Siddiqui. Rohit, Rakesh's nephew, was also injured while trying to intervene. The family claims a local nursing home denied emergency treatment, causing critical delays.

title: India, Russia can now station 3k troops in each other’s territory
description: India and Russia have activated a logistics pact allowing each to station up to 3,000 troops, five warships and ten aircraft in the other’s territory for five years, extendable by mutual consent. The agreement enhances military cooperation, supports equipment servicing, enables joint exercises and missions, and grants reciprocal access to bases, strengthening interoperability in the Indo-Pacific and Arctic regions.

'Weight dropped to 22kg': 75-year-old kept in shackles by relatives, forced to live outside her home
description: A 75-year-old woman, Prerna Devi, allegedly held in shackles by relatives in Amritsar, has been rescued and moved to an old-age home.  The Punjab State Commission for Women intervened after a video of her plight went viral. Police have registered a case against her son and daughter-in-law for alleged maltreatment and neglect.

title: UP man buys truck, runs over son’s killer in revenge, stages fatal crash; plot unravels during probe
description: Driven by vengeance for his son's murder, a man amassed funds, bought a truck, and rammed it into the accused's SUV, staging the death as an accident. Technical evidence and an audio clip later revealed the premeditated murder, leading to a manhunt for the absconding perpetrator.

Ex-soldier among 2 killed in militant ambush on NH-202 in Manipur; 3 injured
description: In a tragic turn of events, a militant ambush on NH-202 in Manipur's Ukhrul district has resulted in the deaths of two individuals, including a retired Army personnel. Three others sustained injuries in the attack that transpired on Saturday afternoon while a convoy made its way from Imphal to Ukhrul.

‘Father of AGI’ says human-level AI 2-3 years away, warns of ‘job apocalypse'
description: AI pioneer Ben Goertzel predicts human-level AGI within two to three years, warning of a significant 'job apocalypse' as most professions become obsolete. While manual labor and some creative roles may persist longer, the focus for humans will shift from earning a living to finding purpose, potentially ushering in a utopian world with more leisure time and UBI.

title: OpenAI exec Srinivas Narayanan leaves to spend time with ageing parents in India
description: Srinivas Narayanan, OpenAI's CTO for B2B applications, is departing the company next week after nearly three years. He plans to visit his parents in India before considering future professional endeavors. Narayanan, who previously served as VP of Engineering, shared his departure on LinkedIn, calling his tenure at the AI firm 'three incredible years'.
